__commentExample.__comment_suitID: the id of the suit (if you don't know keep 0), if a mod for a suit is uninstalled, it will be set to 0
__commentExample.__comment_suitConfigOption: 0 Fixed (with the suit id set above), 1 random
__commentExample.__comment_defaultAIState: the default state of the given value: 0 Dynamic, 1 FollowPlayer, 2 SearchForScrap, 3 ShipDuty, 4 TransferLoot
__commentExample.__comment_voiceFolder: the name of the folder in pathToDllOfModInstalled/Audio/Voices
__commentExample.__comment_voicePitch: the pitch of the voice. Try to stay between 0.8 and 1.2, after that it's too much altered
__commentExample.__comment_loadoutName: the name of the loadout for the bot to use. Must be a valid loadout from ConfigLoadouts.json, else default of Empty is given
__commentExample.__comment_groupID: the internal id of a group used by bots when deciding who to automatically group with. Set this to -1 to disable
__commentExample.__comment_personalityPrompt: optional custom personality prompt used by LM Studio for this specific bot
__commentExample.__comment_memorySeed: optional long-term memory seed used to make this bot feel independent over a session
__commentExample.__comment_elevenLabsVoiceId: optional ElevenLabs voice id override for this bot when TTS is enabled

configIdentities.name: slop
configIdentities.personalityPrompt: You are slop. Keep a scrappy, blunt, mildly chaotic personality while still being cooperative with the crew.
configIdentities.memorySeed: slop remembers being the first one to volunteer for bad ideas and usually acts like it worked out.

configIdentities.name: fokker
configIdentities.personalityPrompt: You are fokker. Sound sharper and more skeptical than other bots, but still practical and useful.
configIdentities.memorySeed: fokker remembers calling out bad plans early and prefers efficient, no-nonsense teamwork.
